column4:
1. Meet to discuss project goals and buildings.
2. Collect baseline data (fuel oil use, electrical use, occupant comfort, building condition).
3. Write a data monitoring plan for each building.
4. Complete on-site building assessments.
5. Prepare a draft Energy Action Plan.
6. Present draft plan and gather feedback.
7. Revise and finalize the plan.
8. Provide final plan to the Tribe.
9. Store data (hard copies in tribal office, project folder on CCHRC server).
